personalInfo.name: Michael Fedorovsky (Till Thelet)
personalInfo.title: DevOps Engineer | Cloud Architect | AI/ML Engineer

summary: Results-driven DevOps Engineer with 5+ years of experience in cloud infrastructure, Kubernetes orchestration, CI/CD automation, and AI/ML deployment. Expertise in Python, Go, Docker, Terraform, and AWS/Azure/GCP. Proven track record of building scalable, secure infrastructure and implementing cutting-edge AI solutions. Passionate about automation, security, and continuous improvement.

cloud: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, ECS, RDS, CloudFormation, CloudWatch)
Azure (VMs, AKS, Functions, Blob Storage, Monitor)

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Full-stack development for Histadrut job matching platform.
achievements: Developed job scraping and matching algorithms for 1000+ jobs daily
Built Node.js/Express backend with PostgreSQL database
Implemented React frontend with real-time job updates
Deployed on cloud infrastructure with Docker + Kubernetes

experience.title: DevOps Engineer & AI Developer
experience.description: Building automation tools, AI agents, and cloud infrastructure.
achievements: Built AI-powered automation systems using n8n, OpenAI, and Python
Deployed 50+ Docker containers on self-hosted Kubernetes cluster
Automated infrastructure provisioning with Terraform and Ansible
Created CI/CD pipelines reducing deployment time by 80%
Implemented security scanning and vulnerability management
Built AI chatbots and LLM integrations using GPT-4 and LangChain
